goals.description: Kill the stream feed immediately and execute the 90-minute deep work block on the scholarship essay uploads; I'm accepting the exhaustion but refusing to let procrastination cost me the money.
goals.rationale: My achievement drive is screaming for the tangible win of securing the scholarship; my risk tolerance is high enough to ignore physical fatigue (sleep debt), but my assertiveness demands I renegotiate with myself right now: no more distractions until this task is physically complete. The short planning horizon means I can't worry about long-term burnout, just the immediate loss of opportunity.

agent.last_reasoning: I'm killing the stream feed; procrastination costs money, not sleep debt right now. This secures the scholarship (achievement). I'll skip texting my hallmate this block since closeness drops slowly anyway.

goals.description: Sprint through the scholarship essay and uploads in one long, distracted burst right now to claim the 'win' before I overthink it later.
goals.rationale: My achievement drive is screaming for a tangible win (the money) to offset my mounting stress. The deadline isn't immediate enough to force discipline, so I'm leaning into my procrastination bias and impulsivity: do it now on a dopamine hit rather than waiting until tomorrow when I might be too tired or anxious to start.

goals.description: Skip the planned fun session for today; it's a distraction that won't help me look reliable to the professor or secure the award.
